fresh_prepare.assertion: all worker-selection fields resolve from invoker_inheritance when persisted continuity and explicit overrides are absent

override_prepare.assertion: all worker-selection fields resolve from explicit_override when override knobs are provided

closeout_resync.assertion: attempt status remains closeout_pending and resume checkpoint remains machine_verification/completed

terminal_completion_negative.assertion: normal-mode terminal completion is rejected before guarded merge-backed closeout evidence exists

mark_complete_negative.assertion: completion fails closed when local target sync truth is unresolved

mark_complete_positive.assertion: completion still succeeds when merge truth and a recorded sync outcome both exist
